## Task
Fix the RangeError: Invalid time value crash in the expense tracker. The date field from the API is sometimes null or in an unexpected format, causing the app to go blank on load. Add a safe date formatting helper that checks if the date value is valid before formatting it, and shows a fallback like "N/A" if it's invalid. Also add a favicon.ico to fix the 404 error.
